Hayakawa

INFORMATION
RESERVATION
ABOUT
HAYAKAWA
ANNOUNCEMENT
we would like to take a moment to express
our gratitude and excitement regarding
our maintaining of the michelin 1 star distinction
IT IS SUCH an honor to have received this award for
2023, 2024 and now 2025
Thank you
to all of our guests, team as well as the michelin guide
as we owe our success to you.
- owner/Chef atsushi hayakawa

meta.meta_description:
Hayakawa is an intimate and traditional sushiya in the mold of the finest 
sushi shops in Japan. Newly location in West Midtown Atlanta, our serenely 
designed space allows for guests to have a truly unique experience.
